steps.title: Show the theory changed
steps.content: The goal is to describe how understanding of the glass's origin evolved. That requires both the earlier 2017 grass-fire explanation and the later 2021 cometary-explosion explanation, so readers can see the change over time. Mentioning only one study would not show evolution; the sentence needs to present the old view and the newer replacement.

steps.title: Reject incomplete histories
steps.content: A gives only the newer evidence about mineral signatures. C gives only the older grass-fire explanation and omits the cometary explanation. D says the studies differed but does not describe either explanation, so it does not show how scientific understanding changed from one account to another. The answer is B.
